Dishes from all over the world in a laid-back rooftop & outdoor venue — breakfast trays by day, live DJs by night, and a menu with absolutely no chill. Anda nahi, andolan hai.

GOLGAPPA·MOMOS FROM HELL· DEATH WINGS·BUTTER CHICKEN BIRYANI· SOCIAL KAMIKRAZY·ROOFTOP · OUTDOOR · LIVE MUSIC· GOLGAPPA·MOMOS FROM HELL· DEATH WINGS·BUTTER CHICKEN BIRYANI· SOCIAL KAMIKRAZY·ROOFTOP · OUTDOOR · LIVE MUSIC·
01 — The Space

Old doors, green
leather, low light.

Reclaimed-door tables, a plant-wall alley of outdoor seating, and a wraparound bar stacked with beer signage — SOCIAL Khar West, exactly as it looks when you walk in.

02 — The Vibe

One address.
Every mood.

By day, SOCIAL Khar West is a collaborative work space — laptops out, cold brew in, breakfast trays till 7:30pm. By night, the rooftop and outdoor seating fill up, the DJ takes over, and the kitchen doesn't stop firing chaat, momos and biryani till 1:30am. No two visits look the same — that's rather the point.

  • 🏙️ Rooftop seating
  • 🌤️ Outdoor seating
  • 🎧 Live music & DJ nights
  • 💻 All-day work-friendly space
  • 🍸 Full bar, beer buckets & sangria
  • 📱 QR + table-side ordering
03 — Khaana

A menu with
zero borders.

Punjabi dhabas, Kolkata coffee houses, Irani cafés, Bangkok street carts, Seoul ramen bars — SOCIAL's kitchen doesn't pick a lane, and neither should you.

Creamy eggs, fancy avo, brioche dressed to impress.

04 — On Now, All of July

Mela Mexicana

Mexico aur India ka milan. Two street-food cultures, one distinctly SOCIAL lens — by Group Executive Chef Shamsul Wahid and Chef de Cuisine Ashish Sharma Diaz Del Castillo.

Guac 'n' Roll Chips

₹495

Three shades of crunchy — pink, green and black nachos, with salsa.

Chicken Biryani Burrito

₹575

#nuffsaid.

Baja-O-Mushroom Taco

₹495

Golden-fried oyster mushrooms tucked into tacos. Thoke tak!

Kebab Paella

₹595

Some call it Spanish biryani. Bomba rice, seekh & chicken tikka.

Concha French Toast

₹375

French toast made with traditional Mexican sweet bread.

Chile Chipotle

₹325 / ₹475

Aloo, or chicken, in a chipotle-kissed chilli sauce.

05 — Peene

A bar built
for the table.

Beer buckets for the group, sangria pitchers for the table, classics made proper by the bar team, and a set of squad shots for when someone inevitably says "one more round."

06 — Word on the Street

4.2★ across
11,531 reviews.

"Consistently rated the best of SOCIAL's locations by regulars, with a menu that spans breakfast to biryani."

— Dharven Panchal, Local Guide

"Good vibes, good food, ambience a perfect 10/10 — a favourite for a chill Sunday lunch."

— Amisha Patel, Local Guide

"A booming bass from the live DJ, quirky design details, moody lighting and a serious variety of food and drink."

— A M, Local Guide

"A cool spot to catch up with friends over a drink — known locally for its finger food and chakna with a twist."

— Milind Salvi, Local Guide

"Service was quick even on a packed Monday evening — and the sugarcane patiala drinks are worth ordering."

— Arpit Bankawat, Local Guide

"A long wait once the office crowd hits, but the staff never rush you off your table — it's worth it."

— Arundhathi Pushpagaran, Local Guide
